name: Skillfully Passionate Kiss
descrip: Skillfully make out. Can lower damage, and has a high chance to crit.
outcome: [AttackerName]'s tongue deftly entangles with [TargetName]'s, passionately teasing [TargetHisOrHer] mouth as [AttackerHeOrShe] kisses away [TargetHisOrHer] thoughts.
miss: [AttackerName]'s tongue deftly entangles with [TargetName]'s, passionately teasing [TargetHisOrHer] mouth as [AttackerHeOrShe] kisses away [TargetHisOrHer] thoughts, but [TargetName] manages to endure the intense kiss!
statusOutcome: [TargetName]'s is left unfocused and disoriented from the passionate kiss!
